home.title: Ambition deserves the right
home.description: Orso Football Agency connects exceptional players, coaches and clubs with opportunities across the world's most dynamic football markets.
home.aboutText: Led by Eren YILDIRIM, Orso delivers honest career management, strategic transfers and long-term support. Every decision is shaped around the person behind the performance.
home.founderQuote: Football careers are built through good decisions, honest relationships and the courage to think internationally.
home.playersText: Profiles built for the next level, backed by serious career strategy.
home.testimonial: Orso's approach is direct, personal and always focused on the next smart step in a player's career.
home.ctaText: Speak directly with a FIFA licensed agent about representation, transfers or international opportunities.

about.title: A modern agency with a personal standard
about.intro: Orso Football Agency is an independent football representation company based in Türkiye, operating across Europe and key international markets.
about.storyTitle: Built around trust, driven by opportunity
about.story: We believe successful representation starts with listening. Our work combines market intelligence, close communication and practical career planning to create lasting value for players, coaches and clubs.
about.ownerText: Eren YILDIRIM is a FIFA Licensed Football Agent focused on transparent negotiation, international market access and long-term client development.
about.value1Text: Clear advice and transparent communication at every stage.
about.value2Text: Decisions designed for long-term development, not short-term noise.
about.value3Text: Cultural fluency and trusted relationships across diverse markets.

players.title: Players with purpose
players.intro: Discover a selection of professional and emerging footballers represented and supported by Orso.

playerDetail.documentsText: Player CV, performance data and scouting documents are available to verified clubs upon request.
playerDetail.noCareerHistory: Career history will be added soon.
playerDetail.noStrengths: Detailed strengths are available from the agent.

coaches.title: Coaches who shape the game
coaches.intro: We support ambitious head coaches, assistants, analysts and performance specialists seeking the right sporting project.

talents.title: Young talent, guided responsibly
talents.intro: Potential needs patience, structure and the right environment. Orso supports young players and their families with responsible, development-first advice.
talents.step1Text: Careful assessment of sporting quality, mentality and development context.
talents.step2Text: Realistic milestones covering training, playing time, education and wellbeing.
talents.step3Text: Thoughtful introductions to clubs and projects suited to the player's stage.
talents.guardianText: We communicate clearly with families and never rush decisions that shape a young person's future.

transfers.title: Transfers built for progress
transfers.intro: From first contact to signed agreement, Orso coordinates the sporting, contractual and personal details behind every move.
transfers.empty: No published transfers are available yet.
transfers.emptyTopDeals: No published top deals are available yet.

news.title: Latest from Orso
news.intro: Player updates, transfer announcements, market insight and stories from our international network.
news.empty: No published news is available yet.

services.title: Representation beyond the contract
services.intro: A complete, discreet service designed around performance, career clarity and sustainable opportunity.
services.representationText: Personal career strategy, contract support and day-to-day guidance.
services.transfersText: Club introductions, mandate management and precise contract negotiation.
services.scoutingText: Targeted player and coach search for clubs across our core markets.
services.careerText: Sporting plans, performance support and long-term positioning.
services.legalText: Structured collaboration with qualified legal and financial professionals.
services.relocationText: Practical support for travel, accommodation and cultural adaptation.
services.clubsText: Orso works as a responsive, discreet recruitment partner for clubs seeking the right profile and reliable deal execution.

contact.title: Let's talk football
contact.intro: For representation, player recruitment, coaching opportunities or international partnerships, contact Orso directly.
contact.name: Full name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.directText: Direct contact with Orso Football Agency.
contact.success: Thank you. Your message is ready to send.
contact.privacy: By contacting us, you agree that Orso may use your details to respond to your enquiry.

footer.tagline: International football representation with a personal standard.
